# NEXUS-AI-Gateway
> API proxy translating Anthropic Messages API to OpenAI-compatible format

## Key Information
- Category: API Gateway / Protocol Translator
- Language: Rust (2021 edition)
- Framework: Axum 0.7 + Tokio 1.42
- Entry Point: src/main.rs
- Config: ~/.nexus-ai-gateway.env
- Default Port: 8315

## Quick Commands
- Build: cargo build --release
- Test: cargo test
- Lint: cargo clippy -- -D warnings
- Run: ./target/release/nexus-ai-gateway
- Setup: ./target/release/nexus-ai-gateway setup --quick

## Architecture
Claude Code → POST /v1/messages → proxy_handler → anthropic_to_openai transform → 3-layer retry → upstream → transform back to Anthropic SSE

The src/proxy/ module contains 10 submodules: mod.rs (handler), streaming.rs (SSE), non_streaming.rs (sync responses), retry.rs (3-layer retry), classify.rs (error classification), rate_limit.rs (throttling), concurrency.rs (per-model semaphores), discovery.rs (model limit probing), overflow_tracker.rs (context window tracking), error_types.rs (upstream errors)

Key dependencies: axum 0.7, tokio 1.42, reqwest 0.12, arc-swap 1.x (lock-free config), tiktoken-rs 0.11

## Environment Variables
| Variable | Required | Default | Description |
|----------|----------|---------|-------------|
| UPSTREAM_BASE_URL | Yes | — | OpenAI-compatible endpoint |
| UPSTREAM_API_KEY | Yes | — | Auth key (or OPENROUTER_API_KEY) |
| PORT | No | 8315 | Server port |
| NEXUS_UPSTREAM_TYPE | No | nim | Protocol variant: nim, anthropic, openai, openrouter |
| MODEL_MAP_* | No | — | See Model Routing below |
| MAX_CONCURRENT_PER_MODEL | No | 5 | Per-model concurrency limit |
| PERMIT_TIMEOUT_SECS | No | 180 | Semaphore wait timeout |
| WEB_FETCH_ENABLED | No | true | Intercept web_fetch tool calls |
| CB_ENABLED | No | false | Circuit breaker |
| CB_THRESHOLD | No | 10 | Failures before opening circuit |
| CB_RECOVERY_SECS | No | 60 | Recovery interval |
| CC_OVERFLOW_THRESHOLD_PCT | No | 80 | Context overflow threshold (clamped 50-95) |
| DISABLE_PROBING | No | false | Disable model capability probing |

Config search order: -c/--config flag → ./.env → ~/.nexus-ai-gateway.env → /etc/nexus-ai-gateway/.env

## Model Routing
Format: MODEL_MAP_<claude_id_with_underscores>=<upstream>:<model>

Hyphens in Claude model IDs become underscores in env var names.

Examples:
- MODEL_MAP_claude_opus_4_6=default:z-ai/glm5
- MODEL_MAP_claude_sonnet_4_6=bigmodel:glm-4-plus
- MODEL_MAP_claude_haiku_4_5=default:moonshotai/kimi-k2.5

Additional upstreams use UPSTREAM_<NAME>_BASE_URL and UPSTREAM_<NAME>_API_KEY.

## Design Decisions (BY DESIGN — Do Not Change)
1. has_thinking = true — All requests force enable_thinking=true via chat_template_kwargs for better NIM output
2. Model identity preservation — Responses return original Claude model ID even when routed to different upstream models
3. anthropic-beta header — Only sent to Anthropic upstream; never to NIM/OpenAI/OpenRouter
4. No Anthropic API key validation — Any non-empty key accepted; upstream credentials validated only
5. probe_model_limit — Sends max_tokens=999999 to discover real model limits for unknown models
6. CC_OVERFLOW_THRESHOLD_PCT — Default 80%, clamped to 50-95 range

## Endpoints
| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|---------|
| /v1/messages | POST | Main proxy (Anthropic API) |
| /v1/messages/count_tokens | POST | Token estimation |
| /health | GET | Health check (returns "OK") |
| /metrics | GET | Prometheus metrics |

## File Structure
- src/main.rs — Entry point, CLI, daemon management
- src/lib.rs — Version constant (must sync with Cargo.toml and VERSION file)
- src/proxy/mod.rs — Main request handler, validation, metrics
- src/proxy/streaming.rs — SSE streaming with anthropic.keep-alive events
- src/proxy/non_streaming.rs — Synchronous response handling
- src/proxy/retry.rs — 3-layer retry with exponential backoff
- src/proxy/classify.rs — Error classification (L1/L2/L3)
- src/proxy/rate_limit.rs — Rate limit detection
- src/proxy/concurrency.rs — Per-model semaphores, circuit breaker
- src/proxy/discovery.rs — Model capability probing with caching
- src/transform.rs — Bidirectional Anthropic ↔ OpenAI conversion
- src/config.rs — Config loading, multi-upstream routing
- src/tokenizer.rs — Token estimation using tiktoken cl100k_base
- src/web_fetch.rs — WebFetch interception with HTML-to-text
- src/models/ — Anthropic and Open API types
- src/prompt_cache.rs — NIM KV_REUSE proxy-side cache
- tests/ — Integration tests with wiremock
